examples: By a strange quirk of fate they had booked into the same hotel.
By a tantalizing quirk of fate, the pair have been drawn to meet in the first round of the championship.
Well, the answer lies in a quirk of history.
When asked about the scheduling quirk, most of the people involved reacted with bemused indifference.
They sold out immediately and Quirk went on to print more than a million.
